airlines.name: Aegean Airlines
airlines.notes: Greek national carrier. Suspended until at least 26/06/2026. Routes: Larnaca, Athens, Crete, Thessaloniki, Rhodes and other Mediterranean destinations.

airlines.name: Air Canada
airlines.notes: Suspended until at least 08/09/2026. Operated 4 weekly flights to Toronto.

airlines.name: Air Europa
airlines.notes: Spanish carrier. Suspended until at least 04/05/2026. Route: TLV-Madrid.

airlines.name: Air France
airlines.notes: Suspended until at least 03/05/2026. Route: TLV-Paris (CDG).

airlines.name: Air Haifa
airlines.notes: Small Israeli carrier operating limited routes from TLV during the current emergency period.

airlines.name: Air India
airlines.notes: Suspended until at least 31/05/2026. Route: TLV-Delhi.

airlines.name: Air Samarkand (Sam Air)
airlines.notes: Suspended TLV service until at least spring 2026. Route: TLV-Samarkand.

airlines.name: Air Serbia
airlines.notes: Not currently operating flights from Ben Gurion.

airlines.name: Air Seychelles
airlines.notes: Suspended until at least 02/05/2026. Route: TLV-Seychelles.

airlines.name: American Airlines
airlines.notes: Announced return to TLV-USA service on 09/08/2026. Currently not operating TLV flights.

airlines.name: Animawings
airlines.notes: Romanian charter airline. Suspended until at least 10/08/2026. Route: TLV-Bucharest.

airlines.name: Austrian Airlines
airlines.notes: Part of Lufthansa Group. Suspended until at least 01/06/2026. Route: TLV-Vienna.

airlines.name: Azerbaijan Airlines (AZAL)
airlines.notes: Azerbaijani flag carrier. Suspended until at least 01/05/2026. Route: TLV-Baku.

airlines.name: Azimuth
airlines.notes: Russian regional carrier. Suspended until at least 20/04/2026. Route: TLV-Sochi (Russia).

airlines.name: British Airways
airlines.notes: Suspended until at least 01/06/2026. Route: TLV-London Heathrow.

airlines.name: Brussels Airlines
airlines.notes: Part of Lufthansa Group. Suspended until at least 01/06/2026. Route: TLV-Brussels.

airlines.name: Bulgaria Air
airlines.notes: Bulgarian national carrier. Suspended until at least 14/05/2026. Route: TLV-Sofia.

airlines.name: Cathay Pacific
airlines.notes: Hong Kong carrier. Not flying to/from Israel at this stage.

airlines.name: Centrum Air
airlines.notes: Suspended with no confirmed return date. Routes: TLV-Tashkent and Samarkand.

airlines.name: Croatia Airlines
airlines.notes: Croatian national carrier. Suspended due to security situation. Route: TLV-Zagreb.

airlines.name: Cyprus Airways
airlines.notes: Cypriot carrier. Suspended until at least 17/04/2026. Route: TLV-Larnaca.

airlines.name: Delta Air Lines
airlines.notes: Suspended until at least 05/09/2026. Routes: New York (JFK), Atlanta, and Boston.

airlines.name: EgyptAir
airlines.notes: Egyptian national carrier. Not flying to/from Israel at this stage.

airlines.name: El Al
airlines.notes: National carrier. Operating emergency/reduced schedule only. Regular flights to NY, LA, Miami, Bangkok, London, Paris, Rome, Athens maintained as emergency service.

airlines.name: Electra Airways
airlines.notes: Israeli charter airline operating flights to various Mediterranean islands and European destinations.

airlines.name: Emirates
airlines.notes: Own Emirates flights suspended until April 2026. However, operates 8 daily TLV-DXB flights in cooperation with subsidiary flydubai, including connecting itineraries.

airlines.name: Enter Air
airlines.notes: Polish charter airline. Not operating regular TLV service due to the war. Route: TLV-Warsaw.

airlines.name: Ethiopian Airlines
airlines.notes: African flag carrier. Suspended until at least 16/04/2026. Route: TLV-Addis Ababa.

airlines.name: Etihad Airways
airlines.notes: UAE carrier. Announced suspension of TLV flights until at least 16/04/2026. Routes: TLV-Abu Dhabi.

airlines.name: Eurowings
airlines.notes: Lufthansa low-cost subsidiary. Suspended until at least 01/05/2026. Routes: TLV-Düsseldorf, Prague, Hamburg.

airlines.name: Finnair
airlines.notes: Finnish national carrier. Not flying to/from Israel at this stage.

airlines.name: FlyILi
airlines.notes: Operating flight (TLV-VIE) for Arkia.

airlines.name: FlyOne
airlines.notes: Moldovan carrier. Suspended until at least 01/05/2026. Route: TLV-Moldova (Chisinau).

airlines.name: FlyYO
airlines.notes: Operating charter flights for Israeli tourism companies. Destinations include Greece, Cyprus, and Hungary.

airlines.name: Georgian Airways
airlines.notes: Suspended until at least 17/04/2026. Route: TLV-Tbilisi.

airlines.name: Hainan Airlines
airlines.notes: Chinese carrier. Suspended until at least 20/04/2026. Routes: TLV-Beijing (PEK) and Shenzhen (SZX).

airlines.name: Hello Jets
airlines.notes: Operating flights between Tel Aviv and Munich and other destinations.

airlines.name: ITA Airways
airlines.notes: Italian national carrier (formerly Alitalia). Suspended until at least 01/05/2026. Route: TLV-Rome.

airlines.name: Iberia
airlines.notes: Part of IAG. Suspended until at least 01/06/2026. Routes: TLV-Madrid and Barcelona (operated via Iberia Express brand).

airlines.name: Icelandair
airlines.notes: Icelandic carrier. Not flying to/from Israel at this stage.

airlines.name: Israir
airlines.notes: Israeli carrier. Operating minimal emergency flights.

airlines.name: KLM
airlines.cancellation_reason: Security concerns — Air France-KLM Group decision
airlines.notes: Operating flights from Ben Gurion to Amsterdam. Suspended until at least 17/05/2026 — check directly with airline for specific bookings.

airlines.name: Korean Air
airlines.notes: South Korean flag carrier. Not flying to/from Israel at this stage.

airlines.name: LOT Polish Airlines
airlines.notes: Polish national carrier. Suspended until at least 01/06/2026. Routes: TLV-Warsaw and Krakow.

airlines.name: Lufthansa
airlines.notes: Suspended until at least 01/06/2026. Routes: TLV-Munich and Frankfurt.

airlines.name: Malta Airlines
airlines.notes: Not currently operating flights from Ben Gurion.

airlines.name: Norwegian Air Shuttle
airlines.notes: Announced return to TLV-Copenhagen route on 17/06/2026.

airlines.name: Pegasus Airlines
airlines.cancellation_reason: Turkish government ban on flights to/from Israel
airlines.notes: Turkish LCC. Government ban prevents operations. Not flying to/from Israel at this stage.

airlines.name: Qanot Sharq
airlines.notes: Uzbek carrier. Operating flights between Tel Aviv and Samarkand and Tashkent.

airlines.name: Red Wings
airlines.notes: Russian carrier. Suspended until at least 18/04/2026. Routes: TLV-Russia.

airlines.name: Royal Air Maroc
airlines.notes: Moroccan flag carrier. Not flying to/from Israel at this stage.

airlines.name: Royal Jordanian
airlines.notes: Operated TLV-AMM under Jordan-Israel peace treaty framework. Not flying at this stage.

airlines.name: Ryanair
airlines.cancellation_reason: Not operating at Ben Gurion currently
airlines.notes: Not active at Ben Gurion at this stage. When service resumes, plans to operate: Vienna, Paphos, Krakow, Brussels, Bologna, Sofia, Naples, Athens, Budapest, Malta.

airlines.name: SAS Scandinavian Airlines
airlines.notes: Scandinavian carrier. Suspended until at least 02/06/2026. Route: TLV-Copenhagen (direct).

airlines.name: Sky Express
airlines.notes: Greek regional carrier. Suspended until at least 17/04/2026. Route: TLV-Athens.

airlines.name: SkyUp
airlines.notes: Ukrainian LCC. Suspended until at least 03/05/2026. Various destinations.

airlines.name: SmartWings
airlines.notes: Czech LCC. Suspended until at least 01/07/2026. Route: TLV-Prague.

airlines.name: SunExpress
airlines.notes: Turkish-German LCC. Not operating from Israel at this stage.

airlines.name: Swiss
airlines.notes: Part of Lufthansa Group. Suspended until at least 01/06/2026. Route: TLV-Zurich.

airlines.name: TAP Air Portugal
airlines.notes: Operating flights from Tel Aviv to Lisbon. Announced return to full Israel service from 01/06/2026.

airlines.name: TAROM
airlines.notes: Romanian national carrier. Suspended until at least 19/04/2026. Route: TLV-Bucharest.

airlines.name: Transavia
airlines.cancellation_reason: Security concerns — Air France-KLM Group decision
airlines.notes: Air France-KLM low-cost subsidiary. Suspended until at least 06/07/2026. Routes: Paris, Lyon, Marseille, Toulouse. Amsterdam expected to resume later.

airlines.name: Transavia Netherlands
airlines.cancellation_reason: Security concerns — Air France-KLM Group decision
airlines.notes: KLM low-cost subsidiary. All TLV routes suspended.

airlines.name: Turkish Airlines
airlines.cancellation_reason: Turkish government ban on flights to/from Israel
airlines.notes: Ankara imposed a complete ban on Turkey-Israel flights amid the conflict. Not operating from Ben Gurion.

airlines.name: United Airlines
airlines.notes: Suspended until at least 07/09/2026. Routes: TLV-Newark.

airlines.name: Uzbekistan Airways
airlines.notes: Uzbek flag carrier. Suspended until at least 14/04/2026. Route: TLV-Tashkent.

airlines.name: Virgin Atlantic
airlines.notes: Not flying to/from Israel at this stage.

airlines.name: Vueling
airlines.notes: IAG low-cost subsidiary. All TLV routes suspended.

airlines.name: Wizz Air
airlines.notes: Wizz Air suspended all flights to TLV until 4th may.

airlines.name: airBaltic
airlines.notes: Latvian carrier. Suspended until at least 01/06/2026. Route: TLV-Riga.

airlines.name: easyJet
airlines.cancellation_reason: Safety review — will not return in summer 2026
airlines.notes: Announced it will not return to Israel even in summer 2026.
